goal: Build an SAT-versus-ACT decision engine for students navigating the current digital SAT and the updated ACT. Use official timing, section structure, adaptive SAT practice behavior, answer-key availability, and score concordance to estimate which test gives a student the better odds of a top-score jump. Then generate a six-week prep plan that reallocates study time after every practice test instead of following a generic schedule. Output it as a website with a parent-friendly PDF study plan.

steps.name: Research test specifications
steps.description: Use web_search to gather current 2026 digital SAT and updated ACT section timings, scoring scales, and official concordance tables.
steps.done_when: Data on SAT/ACT timing, scoring, and concordance is collected.

steps.name: Create decision engine logic
steps.description: Write a JavaScript file 'decision_engine.js' that takes user input (practice scores, speed, math/verbal preference) and calculates the test with higher potential for a top-score jump based on concordance.
steps.done_when: decision_engine.js is created with functional logic.

steps.name: Create adaptive scheduler logic
steps.description: Write 'scheduler.js' that calculates a 6-week study plan, reallocating hours based on weak points identified after each mock test input.
steps.done_when: scheduler.js is created with adaptive reallocation logic.

steps.name: Build website structure
steps.description: Write 'index.html' with a clean, parent-friendly UI for inputting scores and displaying the test recommendation.
steps.done_when: index.html is created with input forms and output containers.

steps.name: Style the website
steps.description: Write 'style.css' to ensure a professional, responsive layout for the decision engine and plan viewer.
steps.done_when: style.css is created and linked to index.html.

steps.name: Integrate frontend logic
steps.description: Write 'app.js' to connect the UI inputs to the decision_engine.js and scheduler.js logic.
steps.done_when: app.js is functional and connected to the HTML.

steps.name: Generate PDF template
steps.description: Use docx_generator to create a professional PDF template for the 6-week study plan that can be populated with the engine's output.

steps.name: Verify code
steps.description: Run workspace_verify_code on all created JS files to ensure no syntax errors.
